Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Rumoi | title = [[:en:Rumoi Subprefecture|Rumoi Subprefecture]] | image = | listclass = hlist | bodyclass = hlist | border = {{{border|{{#if:{{{list only|}}}|child}}}}} | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}}
| group1 = [[:en:List of cities in Hokkaido|City]] | list1 = *[[:en:Rumoi, Hokkaido|Rumoi]]
| group2 = Districts | list2 = *[[:en:Mashike District, Hokkaido|Mashike District]] **[[:en:Mashike, Hokkaido|Mashike]] *[[:en:Rumoi District, Hokkaido|Rumoi District]] **[[:en:Obira, Hokkaido|Obira]] *[[:en:Teshio District, Hokkaido|Teshio District]] **[[:en:Enbetsu, Hokkaido|Enbetsu]] **[[:en:Teshio, Hokkaido|Teshio]] *[[:en:Tomamae District, Hokkaido|Tomamae District]] **[[:en:Haboro, Hokkaido|Haboro]] **[[:en:Shosanbetsu, Hokkaido|Shosanbetsu]] **[[:en:Tomamae, Hokkaido|Tomamae]] }}<noinclude> {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Japan prefecture templates]] [[Category:Subprefectures in Hokkaido]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
